hero.headline: When your AC dies on the *hottest day*, we show up fast
hero.subheadline: 4.8 stars from neighbors who know — we fix it right the first time, even on Fridays at 5pm.

services_section.label: THE FIXES
services_section.heading: Every HVAC Problem We Handle
services_section.subheading: From dying heat pumps to emergency leaks — if it heats or cools your home, we fix it

services.title: Emergency AC Repairs
services.description: Unit quit cooling? We diagnose fast and get your air flowing again, even on the hottest Georgia days.

services.title: Heat Pump Service
services.description: Whether it's repairs on your 20-year-old unit or time for replacement, we'll give you straight talk on your options.

services.title: HVAC Leak Repairs
services.description: Upstairs unit dripping? We find the source and stop the leak before it damages your ceiling.

services.title: System Inspections
services.description: Our techs explain everything in detail so you understand exactly what's wrong and what it'll cost to fix.

about.heading: Your North Macon HVAC Specialists
about.body: We're the team Macon neighbors recommend when their heat pump fails or AC stops cooling. Our technicians like Michael, Odie, and William diagnose problems fast and explain your options clearly. Whether it's an emergency repair or time to replace that 20-year-old unit, we give you honest advice and reliable service.

reviews.name: Mike T.
reviews.text: Michael came highly recommended by locals when our 20-year-old heat pump was dying. He made repairs but gave us honest advice about replacement options.

reviews.name: Jennifer P.
reviews.text: Even after working long hours helping others, Odie called after inspecting my rental property AC. He explained everything in detail and genuinely cared about solving the problem.

reviews.name: Linda S.
reviews.text: Our technician Odie was very helpful and courteous. This is my first experience with them, but I look forward to a long relationship with this company.

reviews.name: Wickedxstranger
reviews.text: William figured out the issue within 5 minutes. Super nice guy, got our air going again in no time. Definitely recommend and will use them again.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving North Macon and Beyond
service_areas.subheading: Fast HVAC service throughout the greater Macon area

cta.heading: AC Acting Up? Heat Pump Struggling?
cta.body: Don't sweat it out or freeze. Call North Macon's trusted HVAC team for fast diagnosis and honest solutions.
